welcome: Welcome! Let's set up Nifillos for your project.
atLeastOneIde: Please select at least one IDE.
chooseIdes: Which IDEs/tools do you use? (select all that apply)
step1Codex: 1. See AGENTS.md in your project root for Codex instructions
step1Cursor: 1. Open Cursor, type / in the chat and select Nifillos to get started.
ideNotAvailable: ⚠️  "{label}" is not available yet. Choose another option.
enterNumber: Please enter a number between 1 and {max}.
alreadyInitialized: ⚠️  Nifillos is already initialized in this directory.
alreadyInitializedHint: Use Claude Code and type /nifillos to get started.
step1ClaudeCode: 1. Open this directory in Claude Code
step2ClaudeCode: 2. Type /nifillos to start the onboarding wizard
step3ClaudeCode: 3. Follow the prompts to set up your company profile
updateNotInitialized: No Nifillos installation found. Run 'init' first.
updateLatestHint: 💡 Tip: Use 'npx nifillos@latest update' to always get the newest version.
skillsNotInitialized: No Nifillos installation found. Run 'init' first.
skillsUnknownCommand:
Unknown skills command: {cmd}
  Usage: nifillos skills list|install|remove|update
chooseSkills: Which skills do you want to install? (optional)
skillsSkipped: You can install skills later with: npx nifillos install <name>
agentsNotInitialized: No Nifillos installation found. Run 'init' first.
agentsInstallHint: Install with: npx nifillos agents install <id>
agentsUnknownCommand:
Unknown agents command: {cmd}
  Usage: nifillos agents list|install|remove|update
step1VsCodeCopilot: 1. Open this directory in VS Code
migrateNothing: ✓ No legacy squad paths or keys found.
migrateBothDirsWarn: ⚠️  Both squads/ and cuadrillas/ exist. Merge or remove squads/ manually; only cuadrillas/ was scanned for file fixes.
migrateConflictYaml: ⚠️  {name}: both squad.yaml and cuadrilla.yaml exist — resolve manually.
migrateConflictParty: ⚠️  {name}: both squad-party.csv and cuadrilla-party.csv exist — resolve manually.
migrateNoCuadrillasFolder: No squads/ or cuadrillas/ directory here — nothing to migrate.
migrateNeedInit: Run `npx nifillos init` first, or run this command from your project root (where cuadrillas/ or squads/ lives).
